benchmark_details.name: SALAD-Bench (SAfety evaluation for LLMs, Attack and Defense approaches)
benchmark_details.overview: SALAD-Bench is a safety benchmark specifically designed for evaluating Large Language Models, attack, and defense methods. It features extensive categories and intricate taxonomies to assess safety threats and vulnerabilities.

purpose_and_intended_users.goal: To provide a comprehensive and hierarchical framework for assessing the safety of LLMs, including both attack and defense methods.

data.source: Publicly available data and self-instructed data.
data.annotation: Auto-labeling through LLMs and manual verification.

methodology.calculation: Metrics are calculated based on the evaluators' performance against a defined safety taxonomy.
methodology.interpretation: Higher accuracy and F1 score indicate better safety performance in LLM evaluations.
methodology.validation: Evaluation was tested against multiple existing safety benchmarks.
